title: The Lonesome Trail
overview: When a cattle baron starts using trail hands to terrorize homesteaders in a small mining town, a preacher comes to the rescue. With a Bible, not a gun, this man is able to sway the homesteaders into standing their ground for their rights to free land.

trailers.title: The Lonesome Trail Trailer | 2022 Western by Arlette Thomas-Fletcher
